_che_mcp_when_released._comment: CHE MCP is not yet publicly released (npm @artificio/che-mcp is 'Phase 3 — Coming'). When it launches, remove the leading underscore from this key to activate it, and remove or disable 'yahoo_finance' above. Fill in real credentials via environment variables — do NOT hardcode secrets here. Docs: https://github.com/Albano-schz/che-mcp-docs
